title: tengine.shadergen.diagnose_completed v1
description: Diagnose report completed — summary metrics only (not the full diagnose report body). Producer: registry handle DIAGNOSE_COMPLETED in crates/tengine-dgc-hal/src/silo/shadergen_handlers/track_group.rs.

fps.description: FPS at the time the diagnose report was generated.

health_pct.description: Overall silo health percentage computed by the diagnose pass.

anomaly_count.description: Anomaly count observed during the diagnose window.

frame.description: GPU frame index at which the diagnose report completed.
